chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 111 & 112 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1867/2016 2. For hearing of main case 01.12.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press these reference applications which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
